programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: Mussolini wanted to recreate the Roman Empire, but proved to be a poor military strategist and his incompetence contributed to Hitlers eventual defeat.

programme.title: Barbarossa: The Lost Diaries
programme.desc: Lieutenant Sander undertakes an arduous journey to Leningrad, revealing the harsh German east campaign of Operation Barbarossa. He notes down his experiences in a diary that provides us a look at the attack on the Soviet Union.

programme.title: Barbarossa: The Lost Diaries
programme.desc: Lieutenant Sander undertakes an arduous journey to Leningrad, revealing the harsh German east campaign of Operation Barbarossa. He notes down his experiences in a diary that provides us a look at the attack on the Soviet Union.

programme.title: D-Day
programme.desc: The planning for the Allied invasion on June 6th 1944 took two years and cost thousands of lives, and involved a deception of breathtaking audacity.

programme.title: World War II: Saving the Reality
programme.desc: Kenneth W. Rendells World War II memorabilia includes more than 6,000 original artefacts.

programme.title: Churchill: The Road to Victory
programme.desc: Winston Churchill served as the Prime Minister of Great Britain in arguably some of the most trying times of modern history. After Chamberlains resignation in 1940, Churchill was appointed during World War II and ultimately led the country down the road to victory.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: War on the two fronts caught up with Hitler leaving him on the run in mid 1943.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler had long been expecting an Allied attack on north-western France, but his problem was knowing when and where it would come. This episode takes a look at the Allied operations Bodyguard and Overload.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: The war in the Pacific against Japan was a savage hand-to-hand, island-to-island struggle, fought by new specialist fighting units like the valiant Chindits.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: Allied forces converge on Germany, uncovering the horrors of Belsen and Buchenwald, before pushing towards Berlin, where Hitler clings to power in his last desperate days.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: With Germany beaten, the Allies turned their attention to Japan, who made them pay for every inch of gained ground. How was this last, great foe overcome?

programme.title: Nazis on the Run
programme.desc: The US army are catching up, entering Berlin with a firm plan to capture as many Nazi officials as they can, their aim to bring them before a court on trial for the atrocities they helped make possible.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators
programme.desc: What persuaded one-time "Man of the Year" Pierre Laval to send Jews to the death camps?

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators
programme.desc: Uncovers the motives behind the people and organisations who made the choice to aid the Nazi war effort.

programme.title: Hitlers Lost Battles
programme.desc: A look at the strategic decisions made by Hitler during the Battle of Britain, which led to Operation Barbarossa, and the Axis invasion of the Soviet Union.

programme.title: Hitlers Lost Battles
programme.desc: The poor military decisions made by Hitler started to become clear by 1942. America got involved in the conflict as a reaction to his declaration of war, as they made ground in North Africa.

programme.title: Winston Churchill
programme.desc: The triumphs of the Prime Minister who led England through its darkest hour and on to victory.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: In the run-up to September 1939, political and economic chaos in the aftermath of World War I allowed Hitler in Germany, Mussolini in Italy and ultra-nationalists in imperial Japan to seize absolute power.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: Germany took just four weeks to conquer Poland, using a new form of warfare - Blitzkrieg. Six armoured tank units known as Panzer divisions, supported by the Luftwaffe, quickly broke through Polish defences.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: The war in the Pacific against Japan was a savage hand-to-hand, island-to-island struggle, fought by new specialist fighting units like the valiant Chindits.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: Allied forces converge on Germany, uncovering the horrors of Belsen and Buchenwald, before pushing towards Berlin, where Hitler clings to power in his last desperate days.

programme.title: Nazis on the Run

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: The Kaiser Sunken Fleet: Ross Kemp continues his adventure in Scapa Flow, plunging down on the wrecks of a German warship and an experimental submarine aircraft called the M2. (S1, ep 2)

programme.title: Cracking the Code
programme.desc: Experts reveal the highly encrypted phones that criminal gangs use to stay under the radar, and explain how the police are turning the phones against the crooks.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Historian Dan Jones is in the heart of Snowdonia exploring a stronghold built not only as an impenetrable fortress but also as a lavish royal palace fit for a fairytale - Caernarfon Castle.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Situated high on a crag overlooking the river Forth, Stirling Castle has guarded the gateway to the Scottish Highlands for centuries. The residence of kings, armies and felons, its battle-scarred walls have witnessed savagery and chivalry, intrigue, alchemy, adultery and murder. Location filming, stunning aerial shots and reconstructions bring to to life its turbulent history.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Alice tells the story of Norman England by studying the history of Winchester, Britains most Norman city. Alice attempts to storm a castle in chain mail, investigates the origins of modern surgery and tucks in to an appetising eel pie.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: In Norwich, the UKs most Tudor city, Professor Alice Roberts learns about religious intolerance, uncovers the Norwich FC canarys origins and experiences humiliating Tudor justice.

programme.title: Shipwrecks: When History Resurfaces
programme.sub-title: Shipwrecked Sailors Of The Roman Empire
programme.desc: Kevin Sempe dives in search of wrecks harking back to the Roman Empires greatness. The journey begins with the Nave Romana.

programme.title: Shipwrecks: When History Resurfaces
programme.desc: Kevin Sempe explores the bay of Saint-Pierre in Martinique, where ships smouldered and sank following the devastating volcanic eruption of 1902.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: A look at the biggest collection of Roman writing tablets in Britain, giving insight into what Roman London was really like. Off the coast of Kent, a dive into the English Channel reveals the biggest marine excavation since the Mary Rose, an 18th-century East India Company ship packed with silver.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice discovers the well-preserved writing tablets, swords and domestic items left by Romans at Vindolanda during a time of British rebellion. On the Scottish island of Iona, there are traces of a long-lost monastery and pilgrimage site that was originally built by the legendary Saint Columba, and has been compared to Jerusalem. In the east of Scotland, a weapons hoard belonging to a wealthy Bronze Age warrior is unearthed.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Situated high on a crag overlooking the river Forth, Stirling Castle has guarded the gateway to the Scottish Highlands for centuries. The residence of kings, armies and felons, its battle-scarred walls have witnessed savagery and chivalry, intrigue, alchemy, adultery and murder. Location filming, stunning aerial shots and reconstructions bring to to life its turbulent history.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the turbulent history of Carrickfergus, one of the most ancient castles in Northern Ireland and a stronghold that holds the key to understanding the tempestuous relationship between Britain and Ireland.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Alice is in Lincoln, getting to grips with life in medieval England. She visits the magnificent cathedral that was once the tallest building in the world and re-lives the battle at Lincoln Castle.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Alice is in London, as she attempts to make sense of the world-changing events during the short but eventful Restoration period. She learns the violent and vengeful truth behind Charles IIs carefully crafted public image.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tonys walk takes him back to 1940 when the sleepy county of Dorset became the frontline in the war against Hitler. His five-day, 60-mile walk along the Jurassic coast reveals the countys hidden World War II story. Starting by the defences on Chesil Beach, Tonys journey encompasses stunning scenery and amazing acts of ingenuity and bravery as he heads east to finish in Swanage and Studland Bay.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson goes for a walk through some of Britains beautiful and historic landscapes. Tony kicks off the series with a 40-mile walk through the glorious Peak District, along the Derwent Valley, where the worlds industrial revolution was born. This is a journey that reveals how Britain transformed itself from a nation of farmers into the industrial powerhouse of the world.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: The team are on the hunt for archaeology from the more recent past as they follow the search for artefacts from World War II. They join marine archaeologists in the Solent as they raise the once-in-a-lifetime find of a Fairey Barracuda divebomber. More than 2,500 Barracudas were in service during the war but not a single complete plane survives today. Naoíse Mac Sweeney joins the post excavation to reveal how the find could help bring this rare aircraft back to life.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts follows an entire year of British archaeology, joining up the results of digs and investigations the length of the country. The results are astonishing, and sometimes disturbing. Roman finds include the mystery of 97 babies murdered by the Thames, a fabulous Roman coin hoard found in Somerset and a man buried on a layer of dead animals.

programme.title: Shipwrecks: When History Resurfaces
programme.desc: From the Indian Oceans clear blue atolls to the icy waters of the St. Lawrence River, an epic expedition with the Cinemarine team to capture the remains of six of the worlds most spectacular underwater disasters.

programme.title: Shipwrecks: When History Resurfaces
programme.sub-title: Uss Monitor, Clash Of The Ironclads
programme.desc: Kevin embarks on a challenging dive in the Atlantic Ocean to explore a battleship that saved the Northern Navy in the American Civil War.

programme.title: After Braveheart
programme.desc: Second and final part of this two-part docudrama which looks at the epic events that are portrayed in the Hollywood movie Braveheart.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: In the late 18th century, there was a sure-fire way to earn a living along the Cornish coast: smuggling. The great walking country is home to tiny secretive harbours, beaches and secluded coves which were once ideal for the infamous illicit imports.

programme.title: Walking Through History

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A first-floor one-bedroom flat in Londons Stepney Green, a three-bed semi in Dartford in Kent and a one-bedroom flat on the 17th floor of a block in Salford are all sold under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A 1930s bungalow in Dereham in Norfolk, a first-floor flat in Londons East Ham and a property in Maryport in Cumbria with a hidden room are all sold at auction. Martin, Lucy and Dion meet the new owners and hear their plans for their investments.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin, Lucy and Dion visit a semi in Ilkeston in Derby, a flat in Streatham Hill in London and a bungalow in Somersets Portishead.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin, Lucy and Dion visit a fifth-floor flat in Greater Manchester, a three bed semi in Carlisle and three commercial buildings near Stanstead.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: An old Derbyshire farmhouse in Wirksworth gets a stunning make over, a developer builds a pair of semis in Chatham in Kent while a mid-terraced house in Blackhall Colliery in County Durham is given a makeover ready for the rental market.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Dion Dublin visits a stone cottage in Tilton on the Hill in rural Leicestershire while Martin Roberts is at a property auction buy in Croydon on the outskirts of London and Lucy Alexander meets two friends who have bought a bungalow in Rainham in Kent.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A mid-terrace house in Chaddesdon in Derby, a two-bedroom flat in Londons Maida Vale and a property in Warrington are all sold under the hammer. Martin Roberts, Lucy Alexander and Dion Dublin meet the new owners to hear what they have planned for their auction buys.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin looks round a pretty cottage with outbuildings with huge potential in Burton upon Trent, while Lucy checks out a flat in Londons Crystal Palace and Dion is in Mossley near Manchester in a four-bedroom bungalow.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin tackles the issue of solar panels on a property in Mountain Ash in Wales and wonders if itll be a sunny outcome for the new owner, while Lucy looks round a barn in Elstree in Hertfordshire and Dion visits a flat in Newport in Shropshire.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts meets a couple who buy a former millworkers cottage in Derbyshire as their first home together; Lucy Alexander meets a father and daughter team who are seasoned developers buying a house in Kent; and Dion Dublin talks to a man who, along with two friends, has clubbed together to buy an investment property in Lowestoft in Suffolk.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Dion Dublin is in Walsall in the Midlands looking around a 1950s semi; Martin Roberts meets a man developing a ground-floor one-bedroom flat in Ilford in Essex; and Lucy Alexander catches up on a multi-million-pound redevelopment in East Horsley in Surrey where one small cottage with a big garden is converted into eight separate properties.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A house with a bathroom layout challenge in Ripley, Derbyshire, a huge three-storey house with its freehold on offer in Erdington, Birmingham, and a mid-terrace house in Londons East Ham in need of a major makeover are all sold under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Dion Dublin is in Lincolnshire looking round a pair of rural semi-detached cottages which the new owner may convert into one home. Martin Roberts is in Cheshire at a bungalow with bags of potential, and Lucy Alexander is in Kent talking to friends embarking on their first project together.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A house in Chesterton in Staffordshire has a smelly problem and needs a total overhaul. The new owner of a semi in Bestwood in Nottingham also has a lot to do, while the new owner of a flat in Strawberry Hill has less than a week to sort out her auction buy before she jets off to Germany.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A husband and wife duo add their design skills to a house in Croydon in Surrey, while a seasoned developer creates a high-end house in multiple occupation in Coventry and a first time developer also does a great job with a house full of period features in Nutall in Nottinghamshire.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts meets one of two young brothers busy building a property portfolio in Bolsover, Derbyshire, while Dion Dublin checks out a three-bedroom semi in Wolverhampton, and Lucy Alexander is impressed by plans to convert a two-bedroom, fire-damaged terraced house in Londons Plaistow into a smart five-bedroom property.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Family Guy

programme.desc: When Gayle tells the family shes sending in an audition tape to be on Tough Stuff Island, Linda is determined to make her tape boring to save her from being humiliated on a rejection reel; Bob struggles with his new electric grinder.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Emmerdale is one of Britains best-loved and highly-viewed long-running drama soaps - set in the heart of the beautiful countryside of the Yorkshire Dales, this realistic and down-to-earth drama superbly chronicles the joys and the heartbreaks of a tightly-knit countryside community.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Liam struggles to come to terms with the news, as a desperate Maria seeks consolation from him. Claire has a novel idea to save money, and David is delighted by Tinas visit.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maria and Liam finally discuss the funeral, but her worst fears seem to be realised when she sees him heading straight into Carlas arms. Gail resolves to contact Ted.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.sub-title: And the Moonbeams Kiss the Sea
programme.desc: When a maintenance engineer is found dead in the basement of the Bodleian library, Lewis and Hathaway investigate a link between the murder and an intruder at a local professors home earlier in the night. Suspicion grows when they visit the engineers house and discover rare nineteenth-century books, which were taken from the library in which he worked.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: When a pawnbroker is burgled, Nick has only one clue. However, a tip-off leads to a discovery of some of the stolen goods which are stashed in a locker rented in Bellamys name. Meanwhile, Greengrass gets involved in a betting scam.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nick and Kate tackle a sensitive situation concerning a former German SS soldier and one of his victims. Kate is also treating Lessor for diabetes, and when he realises he will have to go to court he takes an overdose of insulin.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: With the help of Acting DC Ben Jones, Barnaby investigates the garrotting of a husband and wife outside a deserted cottage near Midsomer Newton. Despite a reputation for being haunted, Winyard is a magnet for villagers, developers and conservationists. Barnaby and Jones must separate truth from rumour in order the reveal the cottages secrets - and catch the killer.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Katie invents a story about her mother having financial problems in a bid to get money from Gray. The tension increases between Carl and Anna, while Bob grows concerned about Viv.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Emmerdale is one of Britains best-loved and highly-viewed long-running drama soaps - set in the heart of the beautiful countryside of the Yorkshire Dales, this realistic and down-to-earth drama superbly chronicles the joys and the heartbreaks of a tightly-knit countryside community.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maria is determined not to make things worse between herself and Liam and still refuses to attend the funeral. Claire and Sally get Ashley and Kevin to agree to the house swap.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maria and Liam have an emotional reconciliation at their babys funeral, leaving Carla out in the cold. Claire and Sally receive their house valuations and Ted contacts Gail.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Amidst a spate of lorry thefts, someone sabotages Susan and Jacks wedding plans. Meanwhile, Kates aunt Eileen pays her a visit telling her that she has some money that her Uncle Henry had left to her in his will, Kate initially refuses it, which puzzles Nick.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Greengrass is left angered after being shot at by local landowner Raymond Walker. Meanwhile, Kate worries about a widow who is being harassed, and Alf finds a kitten and takes it to the station as Mrs Ventress doesnt like cats.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Faith Alexander arrives in Midsomer Deverell to meet her long lost uncle Rex Masters, she is surprised to find that he has disappeared and that he had told everyone that she was killed in a plane crash. Then Rexs body is found in the weir, and his friends produce wills, each claiming to inherit his fortune, but what is the truth about Rexs life of mischief-making, and who wanted him dead?

programme.desc: In 1997, 78-year-old Jean Schwarzkopf was murdered in Florida. The retirees husband owned a jewellery business, was she murdered for her diamonds?

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Seven years into their marriage, something suddenly changes between a husband and wife. A dirty secret at work will come out into the open and lead to a deadly confrontation between the two.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death
programme.desc: A landlord in Birmingham, Ala., approaches his rental home to inspect a broken window when he suddenly hears a baby crying, but what he discovers inside will haunt two families for the rest of their lives.

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: When 38-year-old Michelle Gunshon went missing in December 2004, it wasnt long before police suspected murder, but with no body and a killer on the run, it would be seven years before justice prevailed.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: When Maurice Byrd is found shot dead in his home, security footage reveals he had many visitors before his body was discovered. Investigators must figure out which of those visitors is the killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.sub-title: My Father Let the Darkness in
programme.desc: Lisa cant understand why her mum stays with her dad. He is cruel, unpredictable, and violent. While Lisa finds ways to cope, she always has a premonition that her parents relationship will end badly. She had no clue how terrifying the end would be.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: Sean isnt surprised to hear his brother, Patrick, is arrested again. However, he realises that each time he helped him hed helped a monster living a double life.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: Family man Dr David Cornbleet is brutally murdered in his office. Police must rely on CCTV images of man with a concealed face to lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Detectives
programme.desc: A chilling look at the work of female killers. They can be as deadly as their male counterparts, but they often choose less violent methods.

programme.title: Forensic Detectives
programme.desc: Poisoners are the most devious of killers, relying on stealth or their victims trust in order to steal their lives.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: A student suddenly vanishes after her shift at work. However, CCTV footage shows her last movements, revealing the chilling reason for her disappearance.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: Amy Lord, a 24-year-old former cheerleader, goes missing. CCTV footage from ATMs and outside her home captures when she was taken by her killer.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime
programme.desc: A man survives a canoe accident while his wifes body is found a few days later.

programme.title: Killed Walking Home
programme.desc: Every three days, a woman is killed in the UK. These women could be sisters, daughters and friends. Although there is a lead that breaks open the case, what comes in light of the investigation is one that leaves an everlasting scar on the families.

programme.title: When Fred Met Rose
programme.desc: Documentary series examining what led Fred and Rose West to become serial killers.

programme.title: Fred and Rose: The West Murders
programme.desc: Focuses on the notorious house which the couple shared in Gloucester. Fred and Rose murdered their first three victims - Anna McFall, Charmaine West and then Rena Costello - because they `got in the way. But when they moved into 25 Cromwell Street, the couple began to kill for sexual thrills.

programme.title: Fred and Rose: The West Murders
programme.desc: Looks at how a dogged police officer, Hazel Savage, fought to have the Wests patio excavated when she became suspicious about the whereabouts of their daughter. The film also includes insights from both Fred and Rose Wests former solicitors.

programme.title: Aileen: Life and Death of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: This feature-length film examines Aileens harrowing life, tracing her story from the freezing woods of Michigan to the steamy swamps of Florida, and features her closest friends, her lawyers and even her estranged birth mother. At the heart of the film are the astonishing, unique, troubled interviews Broomfield filmed with Wuornos in prison, including her last, defiant words before execution.

programme.title: The Unsolved Killings of Jack the Ripper
programme.desc: Looking into the different theories about who was behind the brutal Whitechapel killings that rocked East London in 1888.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime
programme.desc: The body of a young woman is discovered on the edge of the Lorette River.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime
programme.desc: When a floating body is found a pathologist determines that the woman had been strangled. An accidental drowning case quickly becomes a murder investigation.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime
programme.desc: Charles Tremblay was beaten and thrown into a river, where he drowned. After his body was discovered Police use DNA evidence to prove he was murdered by a friend after a fight.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime
programme.desc: When a body is discovered in a river, an autopsy discovers the victim had seven metres of ducktape wrapped around his head, and stab wounds to the chest.

programme.title: Police: Suspect No. 1
programme.desc: In Norfolk, an otherwise unassuming summer evening is shaken by an armed robbery. A vehicle is stolen and innocent people are shot.

programme.title: Police: Suspect No. 1
programme.desc: Detective Inspector Burgess of Norwich CID has a problem as the number of home burglaries has rocketed. Looking at the evidence, officers suspect that one man is potentially responsible for a large part of the spike in residential crime.

programme.title: Police: Suspect No. 1
programme.desc: After a raid on a cannabis factory, nine people are arrested and it is up to the team to get to the bottom of which role each suspect played.

programme.title: Police: Suspect No. 1
programme.desc: The team in Norwich gather evidence about a single-punch attack that has left a man seriously injured, and there are no willing witnesses.

programme.title: No Visible Trauma
programme.desc: The stories of three individuals who were the victims of police brutality in Calgary, Canada.

programme.title: American Trial: The Eric Garner Story
programme.desc: Real-life prosecutors and defence attorneys conduct an unscripted mock trial against the NYPD officer who was videotaped using a chokehold on Eric Garner in 2014, using the actual evidence, witnesses, expert testimony and rules of criminal procedure.

programme.title: Oscar Pistorius: The Shocking Release
programme.desc: A plunge into the evening of the murder, the controversial trial, and Oscars early release from prison.

programme.title: Infamous Crime Scenes: OJ
programme.desc: Turn back the clock and uncover the truth behind the OJ Simpson trial.

programme.title: Wild Galapagos
programme.sub-title: In the Grip of the Ocean
programme.desc: The reef life, and the birds, lizards and reptiles that cope with the lava rock islands of the Galapagos, make this remote series of islands a unique natural habitat.

programme.title: Wild Galapagos
programme.desc: The Galapagos Islands are home to animals that have made adaptations, including penguins, iguanas, tortoises, cormorants and - possibly the oddest - the vampire finch.

programme.title: Killer Whales Up Close and Personal
programme.desc: Young killer whale Delphine learns to hunt in the waters surrounding the volcanic archipelago of the Crozet Islands south of Madagascar.

programme.title: Coral Sea Dreaming
programme.desc: The filmmaker highlights the survival strategies of marine creatures in a coral, which is an underwater ecosystem characterised by reef-building.

programme.title: The Birds of Winter
programme.desc: Following the preparations of several wild bird species in migration.

programme.title: The Global Whale Shark Mystery
programme.desc: The whale shark, a giant predator, remains a mystery, with new human connections adding to its intrigue.

programme.title: Changing Seas
programme.sub-title: Sharks in Belize: Jaguars of the Sea
programme.desc: Scientists and explorers uncover the wonders of Earths underwater wilderness. Along the way, they make scientific breakthroughs and highlight how human activity can impact the oceans.

programme.title: Into The Wild: Horses and Dingos
programme.desc: Snowy Mountains wild horses adapt to predators, neighbors, and harsh but nourishing conditions.

programme.title: Into The Wild: Horses and Dingos

programme.desc: Foundlings are people who were abandoned as babies, often in the first hours and days of their lives. Born without a trace, they have had no way to unlock the secrets of their past. programme.desc: A 93-year-old Irish writer Edna OBrien recounts her controversial life, novels, love affairs, and stardom through personal journals.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent silverback gorilla thats been in his care since birth. When a genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an antidote and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: The Dark Tower
programme.desc: Roland Deschain, the last Gunslinger, must prevent the Man in Black from toppling the Dark Tower, the key that holds the universe together.

programme.title: Rumble in the Bronx
programme.desc: A Hong Kong cop on holiday in New York puts his martial arts skills to good use when he helps out a friend whose shop is targeted by a vicious street gang. Martial arts hero Jackie Chan, as always, does all his own stunts.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: A group of petty criminals plan to rig a major traffic jam to divert attention from their bank heist.

programme.title: Clash of the Titans
programme.desc: Perseus travels the underworld to defeat the evil god Hades, who seeks to overthrow Zeus and bring hell to Earth.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Weather scientists Jo and Bill put marital problems aside to track a slew of devastating tornadoes raging through Oklahoma and stay one step ahead of their better-equipped but arrogant rivals. They have to get to the tornado first to be able to test a radical new device, by inserting it directly into the heart of the storm.

programme.title: Twisters
programme.desc: Competing teams of storm chasers find themselves in a fight for their lives as multiple systems converge over central Oklahoma.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: Peter Parker finds a clue that might help him understand why his parents disappeared when he was young. His path puts him on a collision course with Dr. Curt Connors, his fathers former partner.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: The emergence of a powerful new villain and the return of an old friend bring Peter Parker to the realization that all his enemies have one thing in common: Oscorp. Based on Marvel Comics characters.

programme.title: xXx
programme.desc: An extreme sports junkie is blackmailed by the CIA into taking on a highly dangerous mission to Prague in order to thwart the plans of a group of Russian extremists. The reluctant hero soon finds himself with the safety of the USA in his hands - and a complicated romance on the horizon.

programme.title: XXX 2: The Next Level
programme.desc: NSA Agent Augustus Gibbons, fresh off the success of his last renegade recruitment, once again finds himself in need of an outsider. Gibbons and his new agent must track a dangerous military splinter group that is conspiring to overthrow the US Government in the nations capital.

programme.title: xXx: The Return of Xander Cage
programme.desc: After coming out of self-imposed exile, daredevil operative Xander Cage must race against time to recover a sinister weapon known as Pandoras Box, a device that controls every military satellite in the world. Recruiting a new group of thrill-seeking cohorts, Xander finds himself entangled in a deadly conspiracy that points to collusion at the highest levels of government.

programme.title: High Plains Drifter
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger rides into a small frontier town in the American southwest, provoked into a gunfight in which he kills three men, and then begged by the townsfolk to become sheriff. The residents are terrified of the gunslinger but live in greater fear of a gang which intends to wipe out the whole town.

programme.title: The Dark Tower
programme.desc: Roland Deschain, the last Gunslinger, must prevent the Man in Black from toppling the Dark Tower, the key that holds the universe together.

programme.title: The Dark Tower
programme.desc: Roland Deschain, the last Gunslinger, must prevent the Man in Black from toppling the Dark Tower, the key that holds the universe together.

programme.title: The Sloth Lane
programme.desc: A sloth named Laura and her family move to the big city with nothing but their prized family recipe book and a rusted old food truck. The familys delicious food soon catches the eye of a quick-witted cheetah named Dotti.

programme.title: Boonie Bears: Guardian Code
programme.desc: Briar and Bramble lose their mother at a very young age under mysterious circumstances. Many years later, logger Vick takes the bears to visit the Robot Research Institute, and they uncover a clue relating to their mother.

programme.title: Monster Family 2
programme.desc: Baba Yaga and Renfield are captured by a monster hunter so the Wishbone family once again transform into a vampire Frankensteins monster a mummy and a werewolf in a bid to free them.

programme.title: Riverdance
programme.desc: An Irish boy and a Spanish girl journey into the mythical world of the Megaloceros Giganteus who teach them to appreciate Riverdance as a celebration of life.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: Reformed criminals Mr. Wolf, Mr. Snake, Mr. Piranha, Mr. Shark and Ms. Tarantula find themselves hijacked into a high-stakes heist thats masterminded by a new team of delinquents they never saw coming -- the Bad Girls.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Concerned that his half-human grandson isnt showing his vampire side, Dracula and his friends put the boy through a `monster-in-training boot camp just as Dracs old-school father decides to pay a visit.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr., whos intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison and vows revenge against Gru.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 3: A Monster Vacation
programme.desc: Mavis surprises Dracula with plans for a fun-filled summer voyage on a monster cruise. As the pack starts enjoying colossal buffets and exotic excursions, Drac finds himself falling for the ships intriguing but dangerous captain. He soon learns that trying to balance family, friends and romance might just be too much to handle. even for the worlds most powerful vampire.

programme.title: Tim Burtons Corpse Bride
programme.desc: Anxious not to make a mistake in his wedding ceremony, Victor goes to the woods to practise his vows. Unfortunately, he slides the ring onto the twig-finger of a long-dead bride who has been waiting years for a suitor.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: Reformed criminals Mr. Wolf, Mr. Snake, Mr. Piranha, Mr. Shark and Ms. Tarantula find themselves hijacked into a high-stakes heist thats masterminded by a new team of delinquents they never saw coming -- the Bad Girls.

programme.title: The Sloth Lane
programme.desc: A sloth named Laura and her family move to the big city with nothing but their prized family recipe book and a rusted old food truck. The familys delicious food soon catches the eye of a quick-witted cheetah named Dotti.

programme.title: Boonie Bears: Guardian Code
programme.desc: Briar and Bramble lose their mother at a very young age under mysterious circumstances. Many years later, logger Vick takes the bears to visit the Robot Research Institute, and they uncover a clue relating to their mother.

programme.title: Pets on a Train
programme.desc: When a crew of animal bandits embark on a routine swindle, they find themselves caught up in a train heist. Its up to Falcon, a petty thief raccoon, and Rex, a righteous police-dog, to save the animals on this high-speed runway train.

programme.title: Pets on a Train
programme.desc: When a crew of animal bandits embark on a routine swindle, they find themselves caught up in a train heist. Its up to Falcon, a petty thief raccoon, and Rex, a righteous police-dog, to save the animals on this high-speed runway train.

programme.title: Into the Wonderwoods
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Angelo, an aspiring explorer, is left behind by his distracted parents at a rest stop. He then ventures into a forest inhabited by strange, wonderful creatures to find them.

programme.title: The Sweetest Thing
programme.desc: When Christina and Courtney take their romantically disillusioned roommate Jane on a night out, Christina meets Peter and falls hopelessly in love with him. However, having missed her chance with Peter on that particular evening, the trio embark on a hilarious road trip in search of Mr Right.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie is given another makeover to become the face of the Bureau, prior to embarking on a promotional tour. When two of her friends are kidnapped - Miss USA and a beauty pageant director - she decides to investigate on her own, in defiance of orders to the contrary.

programme.title: 48 HRS.
programme.desc: When a vicious convict breaks out of a San Francisco jail, the tough but weary cop assigned to the case needs all the help he can get, even if that means working with another con. The smart-mouthed, wiseguy prisoner has his own reasons for wanting his fellow cons rampage stopped, and a 48-hour release from jail is arranged so that cop and con can achieve their mutual goal - if they dont kill each other first.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: When Brenda Cushman, Elise Elliot and Annie Paradis are reunited at the funeral of a college friend, they discover they have another thing in common: theyve all been dumped by their husbands, Morty, Bill and Aaron, for a younger model. Vowing revenge, they decide to hit them where it hurts most: the pocket. Using help and their various skills, they begin to pick them off one by on.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: American Pie 2
programme.desc: Action-packed sequel in which a group of friends are reunited after their freshman year of college and embark upon a series of comical adventures when they rent a summer house on Lake Michigan.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop from the original film returns to Los Angeles to help solve another case. This time he must direct his efforts towards unraveling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by leather-jacketed punks. The investigation puts him on the trail of an illegal arms dealer and his hit lady.

programme.title: American Pie: The Wedding
programme.desc: Jim and Michelle are getting married and Jim struggles to win over his future in-laws and deal with his embarrassing dad. Meanwhile, Stifler isnt invited to the ceremony, but hes determined not to be left out.

programme.title: Youve Got Mail
programme.desc: Two rival bookstore owners are unaware that they are conducting a secret romance with each other on the Internet. When they discover the truth, they must prevent their business rivalry from interfering with their growing personal intimacy.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An ambitious law graduate decides to leave her job as she feels her skills are not appreciated by her boss, who basically treats her like his PA. However, he wont let her go that easily.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A woman drags her skeptical husband to a renowned counsellors marriage retreat to try to put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: The Phoenician Scheme
programme.desc: Wealthy businessman, Zsa-zsa Korda appoints his only daughter, a nun, as sole heir to his estate. As Korda embarks on a new enterprise, they soon become the target of scheming tycoons, foreign terrorists, and determined assassins.

programme.title: The Phoenician Scheme
programme.desc: Wealthy businessman, Zsa-zsa Korda appoints his only daughter, a nun, as sole heir to his estate. As Korda embarks on a new enterprise, they soon become the target of scheming tycoons, foreign terrorists, and determined assassins.

programme.title: Turtles All the Way Down
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old struggling with obsessive-compulsive disorder reconnects with her childhood crush, she faces the potential of finding love and happiness despite her mental condition.

programme.title: Miss You Already
programme.desc: A woman undergoes treatment to battle breast cancer while her best friend tries to get pregnant.

programme.title: A Mistake
programme.desc: A surgeon allows her young colleague to take charge during a surgery. When a mistake occurs, the surgeon finds herself in a difficult situation.

programme.title: Lets Dance
programme.desc: A widowed performer and her former dancing partner fight her wealthy mother-in-law for custody of her son.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: After discovering that he can travel through time, a young man uses his ability to win the woman of his dreams and save his friend from professional disaster.

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: In 1991, talented figure skater Tonya Harding becomes the first American woman to complete a triple axel during a competition. In 1994, her world comes crashing down when her ex-husband conspires to injure Nancy Kerrigan, a fellow Olympic hopeful, in a poorly conceived attack that forces the young woman to withdraw from the national championship. Hardings life and legacy instantly become tarnished as shes forever associated with one of the most infamous scandals in sports history.

programme.title: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: With the German Army now just across the Channel, newly-appointed Prime Minister Winston Churchill must decide between negotiating a peace treaty with Hitler or standing firm. With the King, the public and his own political party all questioning his wisdom, the hard-drinking Churchill has to survive his own darkest hour and rally the country behind him.

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom falls for a charming neurosurgeon after she moves to Boston to chase her dream of opening her own business. However, when her first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship gets upended, leaving her with an impossible choice.

programme.title: Empire of the Sun
programme.desc: Young Jim has to grow up fast after the Japanese invade Shanghai. Separated from his parents and alone in a prisoner of war camp, Jim must fight to survive.

programme.title: Plainclothes
programme.desc: In the 1990s, an undercover officer is told to entrap and apprehend gay men only to find himself drawn to one of his targets.

programme.title: Lets Dance
programme.desc: A widowed performer and her former dancing partner fight her wealthy mother-in-law for custody of her son.

programme.title: Turtles All the Way Down
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old struggling with obsessive-compulsive disorder reconnects with her childhood crush, she faces the potential of finding love and happiness despite her mental condition.

programme.title: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: WWII evacuee David hates the Germans, but now his life has been saved by one. What is the right thing to do, tell the Army or offer his help?

programme.title: My Penguin Friend
programme.desc: A heartbroken fisherman finds a penguin drifting alone in the ocean, drenched in oil from a spill. He not only rescues the sea creature, but takes it under his wing, finding a sense of joy for the first time in years.

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
programme.desc: At the urging of the wizard Gandalf, unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins joins 13 dwarves on a perilous quest to reclaim the kingdom of Erebor and gains possession of the powerful One Ring.

programme.title: Peter Pan
programme.desc: In stifling Edwardian London, Wendy Darling mesmerises her brothers every night with bedtime tales of swordplay, swashbuckling and the fearsome Captain Hook. However, the children become the heroes of an even greater story, when Peter Pan flies into their nursery one night and leads them over moonlit rooftops through a galaxy of stars and to the lush jungles of Neverland.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A magic portal transports the little blue people to Manhattan, where they must find a way back to their village before evil wizard Gargamel can find them.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: A young Peruvian bear with a passion for all things British travels to London in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone at Paddington Station, he begins to realise that city life is not all he had imagined - until he meets the kindly Brown family, who offer him a temporary haven.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: Inventor Flint Lockwood dreams of discovering an idea that will change peoples lives forever, and after several misguided attempts he may just have done it. Flint has invented a machine that can turn water into delicious food, and, when his first demonstration accidentally sends the machine shooting into the clouds, cheeseburgers begin raining down from the sky.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug
The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: After the dwarves find and awaken Smaug the dragon, a battle arises to gain control of Erebor and the vast treasure inside. Meanwhile, Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: A young Peruvian bear with a passion for all things British travels to London in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone at Paddington Station, he begins to realise that city life is not all he had imagined - until he meets the kindly Brown family, who offer him a temporary haven.

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: Papa and the rest of the Smurfs reunite with their human friends to rescue Smurfette from the clutches of evil wizard Gargamel.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: On the isle of Berk, a Viking boy named Hiccup defies tradition by befriending a dragon named Toothless. However, when an ancient threat emerges that endangers both species, Hiccups friendship with Toothless becomes the key to forging a new future.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: On the isle of Berk, a Viking boy named Hiccup defies tradition by befriending a dragon named Toothless. However, when an ancient threat emerges that endangers both species, Hiccups friendship with Toothless becomes the key to forging a new future.

programme.title: Mouse Hunt
programme.desc: Slapstick tale which follows the misfortunes of two hard-up brothers whose plans to renovate and sell a valuable building are jeopardised by a rogue mouse. The brothers soon find themselves pulling out all the stops in order to evict their tiny resident.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: At a tough training school for American navy pilots, one of the new intake falls foul of the hard-as-nails drill sergeant, but takes it on the chin, and finds the additional strength to help a fellow student who is feeling the pressure.

programme.title: Critters
programme.desc: Hilarity and horror ensue when toothy, carnivorous aliens escape from their space prison, pursued by two merciless bounty hunters. When they reach the Kansas farmhouse of an all-American family, the humans do everything they can to fend off the critters, but they cannot free themselves of the ferocious outsiders.

programme.title: Westworld
programme.desc: Acclaimed futuristic chiller about two strait-laced businessmen who go to a theme park in which robots help them live out the adventures of their dreams. While taking part in a Wild West-style saloon shoot-out, one of the robots malfunctions, retaliating in high-noon fashion. Suddenly the men find their lives are in grave danger as they are stalked by a cowboy robot who will stop at nothing to eliminate them.

programme.title: Full Metal Jacket
programme.desc: A US Marine observes the effects the Vietnam War has on his fellow Marines from their brutal basic training to the bloody street fighting in Hue, Vietnam.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A Secret Service agent-turned-bodyguard finds danger and romance while protecting an entertainer from a stalker.

programme.title: Cool Hand Luke
programme.desc: A gutsy prisoner earns the admiration of inmates and the wrath of guards by constant defiance and bids for freedom.

programme.title: Blade Runner
programme.desc: An ex-cop sets out on the trail of androids who have mutinied in a bid to extend their limited lifespan and fled back to Earth.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Epic tale in which an intrepid archaeologist tries to beat a band of Nazis to a unique religious relic which is central to their plans for world domination. Battling against a snake phobia and a vengeful ex-girlfriend, Indiana Jones is in constant peril, making hairs-breadth escapes at every turn in this celebration of the innocent adventure movies of an earlier era.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Adventure sequel. Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones, on the trail of fortune and glory in Old Shanghai, is ricocheted into a dangerous adventure in India. With his faithful companion Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott, Indie goes in search of the magical Sankara stone, and uncovers an ancient evil which threatens all who come into contact with it.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: The intrepid explorer Indiana Jones sets out to rescue his father, a medievalist who has vanished while searching for the Holy Grail. Following clues in the old mans notebook, Indy arrives in Venice, where he enlists the help of a beautiful academic, but they are not the only ones who are on the trail, and some sinister old enemies soon come out of the woodwork.

programme.title: Blade Runner
programme.desc: An ex-cop sets out on the trail of androids who have mutinied in a bid to extend their limited lifespan and fled back to Earth.

programme.title: The Running Man

programme.desc: A rich property developer wants to take over an exclusive country club and so challenges its pompous president to a game of golf leading to utter mayhem, and a stream of surreal and crude visual gags.

Despite his dislike for his prospective bride, he bows to the inevitable only to meet a light-fingered waitress who steals his heart. John Gielgud won an Oscar for his role as Arthurs loyal but outspoken valet.

programme.title: Blazing Saddles

The townspeople turn on the inexperienced sheriff, and he is forced to turn to a convict, once the fastest gun in the West, for help.

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: Hard-boiled incompetent cop Frank Drebin must stop the evil Vincent Ludwig from completing his diabolical plan of killing Elizabeth II.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear
programme.desc: Lt Frank Debrin uncovers a plot by the polluting energy giants to de-rail ecological plans that could render their products redundant. Theyre led by the evil Quentin Hapsburg who, to make matters worse, is romancing Franks ex, Jane Spencer.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programme.desc: Clueless cop Frank Drebin is hauled out of retirement to save the Oscars ceremony from mad bombers. Anna Nicole Smith provides support in this comic sequel.

programme.title: The Golden Child
programme.desc: A social worker who specialises in missing children is recruited to rescue a mystical Tibetan child from evil forces.

programme.desc: Fast-paced apocalyptic adventure. In a hostile post-World War III world, petrol is the most precious commodity and people will do anything to get it. Embittered lone warrior Max agrees to help when an oil-producing community comes under attack from a violent gang determined to get its hands on their fuel.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
programme.desc: Snatched from the Green Place of Many Mothers, young Furiosa gets caught in the crossfire of two tyrannical warlords. As the tyrants fight for dominance, Furiosa soon finds herself in a nonstop battle to make her way home.

programme.title: Annabelle
programme.desc: A possessed doll that was purchased for their new born child creates havoc, and destroys a young couples lives.

programme.title: Annabelle: Creation
programme.desc: Years after the tragic death of their daughter, a former toy maker and his wife welcome a nun and six orphaned girls into their farmhouse. Terror soon strikes when one child finds a seemingly innocent doll that appears to have a life of its own.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Journalist Eddie Brock is trying to take down Carlton Drake, the notorious and brilliant founder of the Life Foundation. While investigating one of Drakes experiments, Eddies body merges with the alien Venom -- leaving him with superhuman strength and power. Twisted, dark and fueled by rage, Venom tries to control the new and dangerous abilities that Eddie finds so intoxicating.

programme.title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
programme.desc: Eddie Brock is still struggling to coexist with the shape-shifting extraterrestrial Venom. When deranged serial killer Cletus Kasady also becomes host to an alien symbiote, Brock and Venom must put aside their differences to stop his reign of terror.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Eddie Brock and Venom must make a devastating decision as theyre pursued by a mysterious military man and alien monsters from Venoms home world.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: Jurassic Park is now called Jurassic World, a fully functional dinosaur park that sees 20,000 visitors a year, the realisation of owner John Hammonds dreams. The scientists may have gone too far in creating some sort of hybrid dinosaur, which escapes and terrorises the park.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: Three years after the destruction of the Jurassic World theme park, Owen Grady and Claire Dearing return to the island of Isla Nublar to save the remaining dinosaurs from a volcano thats about to erupt. They soon encounter terrifying new breeds of gigantic dinosaurs, while uncovering a conspiracy that threatens the entire planet.

programme.title: Jurassic World Rebirth
programme.desc: Skilled operatives travel to an island research facility to secure life-saving DNA from dinosaurs. As the top-secret mission becomes more and more dangerous, they soon make a sinister, shocking discovery thats been hidden from the world for decades.

programme.title: Coyotes
programme.desc: Members of a family find themselves in a desperate fight for survival when a pack of coyotes swarms their Hollywood Hills home.

programme.desc: When Madame Au Lait is called away to give Chikidee her ping pong lesson, Tommy and Tallulah bake a massive sticky carroty cake on their own. Ignoring the recipe, they make so much mixture that the oven explodes when they try to cook it, showering the whole town with sticky gunk and bringing Pufferty to a standstill! The race is on to free him before Chime Time.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah are having fun helping their friends, but dont stop first to ask what their friends need. So Lopsiloo finds herself on the wrong side of the bridge, the wrong goods are served in Battersbys shop and Puffertys favourite ball is thrown out when they tidy his kennel. It is only when they take McCogginss scooter away for cleaning that they finally realise the error of their ways.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Madame Au Lait is cleaning the clockhouse so Tommy and Tallulah take their jammy sandwiches to their room to eat. When some jam gets splodged on a blanket, they dont want to upset Madame Au Lait so they clean it themselves, but when they hang it out to dry on Pufferty, it floats off and lands in a muddy puddle! Whatever will Madame Au Lait say.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Chikidee is making slow but steady progress learning to fly, so Tommy and Tallulah try to help by making her a gigantic paper aeroplane. They dont realise, until its too late, that Chikidee cant control it and has no idea how to land! Chime Time is imminent but they cant leave their friend adrift in the sky. How can they talk her down safely?

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah offer to do the polishing so that Madame Au Lait can make their favourite fruity trifle. While she is out buying the ingredients, the twins go polish crazy, thinking that the more they use the happier Madame Au Lait will be and the more trifle she will make. The clockhouse is gleaming when Madame Au Lait returns, but when she sets a hoof on the floor she finds that it as slippery as an ice rink.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team visit Smithills Hall in Bolton where they encounter tales of religious persecution and a host of paranormal phenomena including the ghost of a man called reverend George Marsh who was burnt alive in 1555 for his beliefs.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team visit the Peterborough Museum, but away from the exhibits lies a room that strikes fear into those who dare to enter, and some crew members soon wish theyd passed up the opportunity to visit the museums hidden depths.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The `Most Haunted team visit the Ancient High House in Stafford, which was built in the late 1500s. Throughout the years there have been numerous reports of ghost sightings, but will the team find evidence of paranormal activity?

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding, guest medium Ian Shillito, and the team investigate ghostly phenomena at the Royal Exchange Theatre in Manchester, where a modern day character decides to play his part in welcoming the `Most Haunted team to his domain.

programme.title: Patterns

programme.desc: The story of Charlie, who as a boy fell in love with a Portland Vase on a trip to a museum, pursues his dream as an antiques dealer.

programme.title: Someone at the Door
programme.desc: A reporter fakes a murder, but lands in trouble when a real one occurs.

programme.title: Burnt Evidence
programme.desc: Lamont plays the jealous husband of Hylton. When confronting her lover, he accidentally shoots the man and runs for the hills.

programme.desc: A British toy manufacturer who doubles as a spy learns his Swedish girlfriend is also a spy.

programme.title: The Buccaneers
programme.desc: A seemingly friendly Spanish landing force takes over New Providence and claims Spain and Britain are at war.

programme.title: October Moth
programme.desc: A violent, mentally unbalanced man on a remote farm imagines an accident victim is his long dead mother, and his sister tries to get help for the unconscious woman without her brothers knowledge.

programme.title: Dial 999
programme.desc: A top designer claims his work is being plagiarised. Maguire believes the complaint does not warrant immediate attention.

programme.title: Damn the Defiant!
programme.desc: An 18th-century ship captains crew are driven to mutiny by the viciousness of one of the officers, despite the dangers of invasion by the French.

programme.title: BFI: Fully Fitted Freight
programme.desc: The story of the fast freight, 4:48 pm, Bristol-Leeds, vacuum braked throughout. Conveyed in crisp black and white images by veteran cinematographer Ronald Craigen.

programme.title: Those British Faces
programme.desc: Remembering the marvellous actor, singer, and comedian Stan Holloway, who enjoyed a seven-decade career and was best known for his roles in My Fair Lady and The Lavender Hill Mob.

programme.title: Out of Town
programme.desc: On a playing field near the South Coast, Jack Hargreaves watches a demonstration of beach casting before visiting a pack of basset hounds in Somerset.

programme.title: Scotland Yard
programme.desc: A Thames estuary dredger drags a mans body from the bed of the river.

programme.title: Buccaneer
programme.desc: Burtons African deal backfires, the board rebels and a wildlife transport idea arrises.

programme.title: The Brave Dont Cry
programme.desc: Trapped Scottish coal miners wait below as their loved ones wait above, as a young official tries a rescue.

programme.title: The Night of the Shooting Stars
programme.desc: During World War II, an Italian village finds itself caught in the bloody struggle between retreating Nazi forces, stubborn fascists, local partisans and the incoming U.S. forces. A group of villagers, including love-struck Galvano and his dream girl, Concetta, opt to leave their village and search for American troops. The story, set in part during a Tuscan celebration, is told from the point of view of 6-year-old Cecilia.

programme.title: Budgie
programme.desc: Charlie Endell drives Budgie to a football match in his Rolls Royce. Just after they park, someone tries to shoot Charlie.

programme.title: Auntie Lees Meat Pies
programme.desc: A devil-worshiping woman sends out her four beautiful nieces to find young men, who are lured back to her place so they can be killed, ground up, and sold as meat pies.

programme.desc: A devil-worshiping woman sends out her four beautiful nieces to find young men, who are lured back to her place so they can be killed, ground up, and sold as meat pies.

programme.title: The Amelia Earhart Mystery
programme.desc: Amelia Earhart was the first woman to fly alone across the Atlantic Ocean in 1928. Her disappearance during a circumnavigation flight of the globe in 1937 has been a mystery to this day.

programme.title: Weapons of World War II
programme.desc: How the weaknesses of battleships were exposed by the superiority of attacks from the air, a move which contributed to the demise of the warship.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: Only 500 RAF fighter pilots took part in the battle of Britain but this episode also focuses on the 20,000 men and women who fought a clandestine war and who also made the victory possible.

programme.title: Gladiators of World War II
programme.desc: The Norwegian resistance movement was one of the most effective movements in the whole of occupied Europe, and its activities helped the British to contain - and then destroy - Germanys mightiest warships.

programme.title: Historys Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: During the Second World War, Germany used the Ju 52 transport aircraft to deliver troops and their supplies when the country invaded Norway, Denmark, France, and the Low Countries.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War
programme.desc: As the war encompasses the globe, the conflict takes root in Africa. Mussolini sends ill-prepared soldiers into the field, forcing Germany to come to his aid.

programme.title: Battlefield
programme.desc: Explores the decisive naval battle between Allied and Japanese forces- focusing on the capture of this island in the Solomons that was crucial to victory.

programme.title: Battleplan
programme.desc: A look at the most feared aspect of warfare, when a commander and his forces have to break through a defensive line. The first of two case studies is the US Armys assault under General Pershing on the Hindenburg Line in 1918 and the second is the Battle of El Alamein in 1942, when British forces under General Montgomery broke through against Rommels Afrika Korps.

programme.title: Heroes of World War II
programme.desc: The story of Ewen Montagu, who devised a cunning deception whereby the body of a dead officer was purposely washed ashore in Spain with false information about Allied landings in the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Icons
programme.desc: A look at the professional and humanitarian work of Angelina Jolie and how she continued to pursue her dream of fame through tough times, eventually becoming one of the most famous actresses in the world.

programme.title: Where Were You?
programme.desc: There are some news events that change the world. In todays episode we take you back to some of Northern Irelands darkest days and the journey towards lasting peace that was agreed on Good Friday...

programme.title: That Was Nam
programme.desc: The evolution of the Vietnam conflict from a regional military engagement to an ever-expanding war. Exploring how it was logistically possible, as told by grunts who lived it, including scenes from bomb sights and gun sights.

programme.title: Wrecks That Changed the World
programme.desc: Investigations into three historical collisions expose the volatile risks at sea and demonstrate how these incidents have shaped maritime regulations and technological advancements.

programme.title: Great Raids of World War II
programme.desc: Royal Marine Major `Blondie Hasler came up with the idea of a sending a special raiding force in canoes 90 miles up the heavily guarded Gironde River to Bordeaux. The plan was to wreak havoc over this key port through which came vital raw materials from the Far East, essential to keep the Nazi armies fighting.

Realising that shes stuck in the 80s for the time being, a desperate Alex distracts herself by contacting her mother and going on a date with a handsome Thatcherite. As bombs threaten to ruin Charles and Dianas big day, Gene demands that Alex acknowledge this world has the power to hurt.

programme.title: Gladiators of World War II
programme.desc: When American forces began the re-conquest of the Philippine islands in 1944 they faced a terrifying weapon - the Kamikaze suicide attack.

programme.title: Special Forces

programme.title: Coastal Warfare in WWII

programme.title: Battleplan

programme.desc: How the mathematical geniuses of Bletchley Park, otherwise known as Station X, cracked Nazi Germanys enigma code for the Allies.

programme.desc: Mickie reconsiders her future following criticism from Mubbs, Jess decides to put her own feelings before her fathers wishes and Owen reassesses his priorities.

programme.title: Classic Casualty
programme.desc: Kirsty prepares to leave Warren, and the staff are devastated they failed to notice the extent of Ruths mental health problems.

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Hollis stumbles across some grave goings-on at a crematorium, while Brownlow confronts a ghost from his past.

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: The Masoods are the talk of the Square. To Whitneys horror, Billie is determined to attend his army interview. Meanwhile, Liz returns from Spain.

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: A furious Qadim returns to the Square with a score to settle. Pat and Peggy prepare for their hot dates - with the same man! Becca hatches a plan, but will Fat Boy play ball?

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: With Calum now in Nova Scotia and Tristan away, Siegfried arranges for Willie Bannister to assist them for a period of time.

programme.title: Howards Way
programme.desc: Jack, Bill and Leo face stormy waters as they set sail together, while Sir Edward returns to Tarrant with business on his mind.

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: When a bird-watcher goes missing and a young woman is found dead at the bottom of a cliff, Hetty has her next case.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: A strange young man turns up asking for help when his car radiator springs a leak, but Sharon wonders if he is a police spy getting information on Chris and Darryl and regrets talking too much.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Compo and Clegg are not as fit as they need to be, according to Foggy, but Clegg has a sneaking suspicion that some of the worlds nicest people are those with tired, flagging limbs.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Compos passion for Nora Batty clashes with his concern for his missing ferret, whom he suspects has taken refuge in Noras clothes basket. Getting past the ferocious Nora presents a problem, despite the sympathetic support of his loyal friends Clegg and Foggy.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Sid wants to install a new bell for the cafe door, but his is doomed since he asked the trio for their help.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown spies trouble when Lady Felicia returns to Kembleford.

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: Its the Great Slaughter Giant Marrow Contest and the town is buzzing with excitement. But before the judging can commence, a gruesome discovery is made in Edies allotment plot.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Gerry meets his heroes, the 70s rock band Bad Faith, when the team investigate the death of its lead guitarist. It is over 30 years since the group split up and the ageing rockers dont quite live up to the legends Gerry remembers. Meanwhile, determined to prevent UCOS from disbanding, Brian finally tracks down Jack and tries to persuade him to return.

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: Old wounds are reopened when Lynley investigates the disturbing death of his godson more than a decade after the boys disappearance. Lynley is drawn into the case, leading him first to Rome and then headlong into the middle of a new murder enquiry in which Lynley himself becomes the prime suspect. Will Havers be able to save his skin?

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: When a bird-watcher goes missing and a young woman is found dead at the bottom of a cliff, Hetty has her next case.

programme.title: Whitstable Pearl
programme.desc: With her son grown, single mum Pearl pursues her lifelong dream and starts a private detective agency, which she runs from her family restaurant in the coastal town of Whitstable; locals soon flock to her with all kinds of cases.

programme.title: Whitstable Pearl
programme.desc: With her son grown, single mum Pearl pursues her lifelong dream and starts a private detective agency, which she runs from her family restaurant in the coastal town of Whitstable; locals soon flock to her with all kinds of cases.

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: The cast and crew of a local film production are shocked to find a real gun on set, leading to disastrous consequences. Sister Boniface and her new friends at the police department attempt to unravel the mystery.

programme.title: Lucy Worsley Investigates
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley investigates how Georges mental illness changed Britain. She uncovers Royal papers and explores how the attempt on his life by a mentally ill subject changed psychiatry forever.

programme.title: Lucy Worsley Investigates
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley investigates how the trial of one `witch sparked Britains witch-hunt craze. She begins her investigation in North Berwick, a seaside town not far from Edinburgh, where the witch hunting craze began. The story goes that in 1590, a coven of witches gathered here to cast a spell to try to kill the King of Scotland, James VI.

programme.title: Villages by the Sea
programme.desc: Archaeologist Ben Robinson discovers the story of the monks and villagers of the Holy Island of Lindisfarne, off the Northumberland coast. From Holy Island, monks spread Christianity to the rest of Northern England and created one of Britains finest treasures: The Lindisfarne Gospels.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Man and Beast with Martin Clunes
programme.desc: In the first episode he travels to Nepal, where he meets a farmer whose cows not only give him an income from milk, but provide the fuel for lighting and cooking in the family home. At the popular tourist destination of Ko Yao Noi in South East Asia, he sees the hard-working monkeys trained to scale 100 foot trees to pick ripe coconuts.

programme.title: Man and Beast with Martin Clunes
programme.desc: Martin examines how pet ownership in Japan is scaling new heights of intensity, with more than 24 million cats and dogs sharing the pavements of the countrys already crowded cities.

programme.title: Martin Clunes Islands of Australia
programme.desc: Martin encounters rare wildlife, discovers unique cultures and sees how pearls are formed.

programme.title: Martin Clunes Islands of Australia
programme.desc: Martin swims amongst coral gardens in Ningaloo Reef and visits Carnac Island, home to several hundred tiger snakes.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor attempts to convince people there are monsters in the caves, prompting Major Baker to start shooting at a reptile man.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Silurians contact Quinn for help in retrieving their fellow while the Doctor and the Brigadier organise a search of the moors.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: With Quinn dead, the Brigadier decides to take an armed party into the caves, prompting the Doctor to contact the Silurians himself.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Worried about the Old Silurians growing friendship with the Doctor, the Young Silurian has the scientist infect Baker with a virus and then release him.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: While the Doctor and Liz try to find a cure to the virus spread by Baker, the Young Silurian kills the Old Silurian and takes control of his people.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: While Liz distributes the cure to the virus, the Doctor discovers the Silurians now plan to wipe out humanity by destroying the Van Allen Belt.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Bruno, a Staffordshire bull terrier, is brought in by Belinda when he suffers complete paralysis in his back legs. Gandalph, a Devon Rex cat, has been struck by a car, and Padraig Egan and his team rush to save his life.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick pushes the boundaries of life-saving veterinary medicine with Katies Alsatian puppy. Noel must also perform a delicate surgery on a young Chihuahua, Jin, who is suffering from a neck deformity.
